    Interface
    Description
    com.saperion.intf.SaDocAccessData
    use SaACLRights instead
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    com.saperion.connector.service.LegacyAwareRmiClientService
    don't use this class
    com.saperion.operations.lookup.CreateLookupEntry
    use CreateLookupEntryOperation instead
  • Deprecated Exceptions
    Exceptions
    Description
    com.saperion.exception.SaOperationRmiException
     
    com.saperion.exception.SaOperationRuntimeException
     
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    com.saperion.constants.SaConstants.ANY_MANDANT
    com.saperion.constants.SaConstants.FIELD_MV
    com.saperion.constants.SaWFConstants.WF_SYS_FIELDS
    use SaWFConstants.WF_SYS_FIELDS_SET instead. Will be removed in 8.1.
    com.saperion.constants.SaWFConstants.WF_USER_FIELDS
    use SaWFConstants.WF_USER_FIELDS_SET instead. Will be removed in 8.1.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    com.saperion.common.lang.conversion.Conversion.convertInputStreamToByteArray(InputStream)
    use Streams.convertInputStreamToByteArray(java.io.InputStream) instead
    com.saperion.connector.rmi.AbstractDocRMIClientCommand.getAllACLs()
    com.saperion.connector.rmi.SaRMIClientCommand.getAllACLs()
    com.saperion.connector.rmi.SaRMIClientCommand.logon(int)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.addListener(SaEventListener)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.addListener(SaStatusEventListener)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.createDocument(String, Properties, InputStream[], String)
    will be removed with version 8.1, use SaClassicConnector.createDocument(DocumentInfo) instead.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.createDocument(String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String)
    will be removed with version 8.1, use SaClassicConnector.createDocument(DocumentInfo) instead.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.createFolder(String, String, String, String, SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE, Properties)
    use SaClassicConnector.createFolder(SaFolderSaveInfo, Properties) instead. Will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.getAllACLs()
    use SaClassicConnector.getAcls() instead. Will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.getAnnotations(String, int)
    use SaClassicConnector.getAnnotations(String, int, boolean) instead. Will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.getDBDefinition(String)
    use SaClassicConnector.getDDC(String) instead. Will be removed in version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.getFolderInfo(String, String)
    use SaClassicConnector.getFolderInfo(String, String, boolean) instead. Will be removed in version 8.1.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.getFolderUpdateInfo(Map<String, Long>)
    No longer supported. Will be removed in 8.1.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.getFulltext(String, String)
    Will be removed in 8.1. Use SaClassicConnector.getFulltext(String, String, String, long) instead.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.getInvolvedUsers(String)
    use SaClassicConnector.getAuthorizedUsers(String, String, MatchKind) instead. Will be removed in version 8.1.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.logon(byte[], int, String)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.logon(int)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.logon(String, String, int, String)
    use SaClassicConnector.logon(Credentials) with UsernamePasswordKey instead. Will be removed in version 8.1.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.logon(NtlmPasswordAuthentication, int, String)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.readDocumentFilename(String, boolean, int)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.readVersionDocumentFilename(String, int)
    use getDocumentInfo.getFullName() instead. Will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.removeEvent(SaEvent)
    no longer supported. Will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.removeListener(SaEventListener)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.removeListener(SaStatusEventListener)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.search(String)
    Use searchHQL() instead. Will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.setCurrentUserPresent(boolean)
    Use SaClassicConnector.updateCurrentUserInformation(MutableUserInformation) instead. Will be removed with version 8.1.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.stopServer()
    Functionality removed because of security-concerns. Method contained for compatibility only. Use windows service management tool or SAPERION MMC to stop the server. Will be removed with version 8.1.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String)
    will be removed with version 8.1, use SaClassicConnector.updateDocument(UpdateDocumentInfo) instead.
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String, boolean)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnector.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String, boolean, boolean)
    will be removed with version 8.1
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.addListener(SaEventListener)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.addListener(SaStatusEventListener)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.createDocument(String, Properties, InputStream[], String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.createDocument(String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.createFolder(String, String, String, String, SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE, Properties)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.getAllACLs()
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.getAnnotations(String, int)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.getFolderInfo(String, String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.getFolderUpdateInfo(Map<String, Long>)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.getFulltext(String, String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.logon(byte[], int, String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.logon(NtlmPasswordAuthentication, int, String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.removeEvent(SaEvent)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.removeListener(SaEventListener)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.removeListener(SaStatusEventListener)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.search(String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.stopServer()
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String, boolean)
    com.saperion.connector.SaClassicConnectorImpl.updateDocument(String, String, Properties, InputStream[], String, String, boolean, boolean)
    com.saperion.connector.wf.SaWFTask.setAliasActor(ActorInfo)
    this method actually sets the next actor by overwriting the nextActor field. Use SaWFTask.setAlias(ActorInfo) instead. Will be removed in 8.1.
    com.saperion.intf.SaDocInfo.ElementInfo.getFileName()
    Since 7.1 SP1 use SaDocInfo.ElementInfo.getName() or SaDocInfo.ElementInfo.getFullName() instead
    com.saperion.intf.SaUserInfo.getDisplayName()
    use getUserName() instead
    com.saperion.intf.SaUserInfo.getName()
    use SaUserInfo.getUserName() instead
    com.saperion.intf.SaUserInfo.getType()
    use SaUserInfo.getGroupKind() instead
    com.saperion.rmi.common.SaRMIServerCommand.getAllACLs(int)
    use SaRMIServerCommand.getAcls(int) instead
    com.saperion.rmi.SaRMIInputStream.available()
     
    com.saperion.rmi.SaUserInfoImpl.getDisplayName()
    com.saperion.rmi.SaUserInfoImpl.getName()
    com.saperion.util.MimeUtil.getFilename(String)
    Will be removed in 8.1. Use MultipageDocUtil.getFilename(String) instead.
    com.saperion.util.StreamUtil.copyInToOut(InputStream, OutputStream, int, boolean)
    Use Streams.stream(java.io.InputStream, java.io.OutputStream, int) instead.
    com.saperion.util.StreamUtil.readBytes(InputStream, int, boolean)
    use Streams.convertInputStreamToByteArray(java.io.InputStream) instead
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    com.saperion.rmi.SaDocumentInfoImpl(SaPropertyValue[], SaJNILockInfo)
    use SaDocumentInfoImpl(SaPropertyValue[], SaLockInfo)
    com.saperion.rmi.SaUserInfoImpl(int, int, UserName, int, int, boolean)
    use SaUserInfoImpl(int, int, UserName, int, int, boolean, UserFlags) instead
    com.saperion.wf.WorkflowMemberImpl(int, int, UserName, int, int, WorkflowMemberImpl, boolean)
    use WorkflowMemberImpl(int, int, com.saperion.users.UserName, int, int, WorkflowMemberImpl, boolean, com.saperion.users.UserFlags, String) instead
    com.saperion.wf.WorkflowMemberImpl(int, int, String, int, int, String, WorkflowMemberImpl)
    use WorkflowMemberImpl#WorkflowMemberImpl(int, int, UserName, int, int, WorkflowMemberImpl, boolean) instead
